title: Roeperia tuberculata
taxonomy: Roeperia tuberculata is classified as a species of ant. It is a type of fungus-growing ant in the subfamily Attini. The genus Roeperia is a group of ants within the tribe Attini, which are known for their unique behavior of cultivating fungi for food. The classification of Roeperia tuberculata is as follows: Kingdom: Animalia, Phylum: Arthropoda, Class: Insecta, Order: Hymenoptera, Family: Formicidae, Genus: Roeperia, Species: R. tuberculata.
